description: A guest with a standard room reservation is checking in. The agent sees that suites are available and attempts to upsell the guest.

nodes.task_description: While checking the guest in, notice their anniversary is noted in the reservation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a special occasion from the reservation notes.
Agent confirms that a junior suite is available.

nodes.task_description: Offer the guest a special, discounted rate to upgrade to the suite for their anniversary.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a personalized upsell offer, which the guest accepts.

nodes.task_description: Update the reservation to the new room type and rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully modifies the booking to reflect the upgrade.
